query: What is the most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date acres burned figure for 2026, latest available as of late June 2026? Report the exact YTD acres and date.
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary:

**Answer: The most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date figure available as of late June 2026 was reported on June 29, 2026: "more than 4,800 square miles" ≈ 3,072,000 acres (~3.07 million acres) burned nationwide so far in 2026.**

Key points:
- **Exact figure & date:** ~3.07 million acres (reported by AP as "more than 4,800 square miles"), dated **June 29, 2026** — described by NIFC/AP as "the most by this point in the year since 2022 and significantly above the 10-year average." This coincided with NIFC raising the National Preparedness Level to 4 (of 5) that same day.
- **Corroborating earlier figure:** As of **June 22, 2026**, NIFC National Fire News reported **34,038 fires / >2.7 million acres**.

**Critical caveat:** The NIFC National Fire News and Statistics web pages update *daily and overwrite* prior figures. When accessed, they showed a *later* July 11, 2026 snapshot (38,747 fires / 3,453,727 acres) — NOT the late-June value. So the late-June answer must come from contemporaneous reporting quoting the NIFC/IMSR on those dates. Because the AP figure was rounded to square miles, no more-granular official acre count for the exact June 29 IMSR survives in cached sources. I also flagged a July 3 Newsweek figure (2.07M acres) as an inconsistent outlier.
